title: Nurses and midwives (per 1,000 people)
definition: Nurses and midwives include professional nurses, professional midwives, auxiliary nurses, auxiliary midwives, enrolled nurses, enrolled midwives and other associated personnel, such as dental nurses and primary care nurses.

source.license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International unless specifically labeled otherwise by World Bank metadata

editorial.shortHook: A candidate map for nurses and midwives.
editorial.patternNote: The darkest countries include Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, while the lightest include Niger, Central African Republic, Madagascar; that contrast is the fastest way to read the nurses and midwives pattern.
editorial.whyItMatters: Nurses and midwives may add useful WORLDPRINT variety once source coverage, unit clarity, map interest, and distractor ambiguity are reviewed.

bestProbeCountries.reason: High anchor: this country sits near the darkest end of the map.
Low anchor: this country clarifies the lightest end of the scale.
Middle check: this country helps separate a true pattern from one-off outliers.

commonConfusions.reason: Human capital education index can tempt players because it shares a strong country ranking with this map, but its unit and definition point to a different story.
Human Capital Index can tempt players because it shares a strong country ranking with this map, but its unit and definition point to a different story.
Health spending per person can tempt players because it shares a strong country ranking with this map, but its unit and definition point to a different story.

editorial.difficultyReason: Standard difficulty: the map has readable regional structure, but the best answer still depends on checking the unit and country anchors.
regionalSignals: Health maps often separate income, public-health capacity, and conflict exposure.
Check both high-income and low-income anchors.

reviewNotes: Batch 2 QA: useful health-workforce idea, but the selected year is older than the rest of the beta catalog.
Needs review for freshness and reveal wording before gameplay.
